name: Aviz Certified Community SONiC
description: A pre-tested, multi-ASIC, enterprise-ready SONiC distribution supporting silicon from NVIDIA, Cisco, Marvell, and Broadcom with 500+ automated tests and 24/7 commercial support.

name: Enterprise SONiC by STORDIS
description: STORDIS Enterprise SONiC Distribution is a ruggedised, commercially supported NOS based on Broadcom's SONiC with feature enrichment for data-center, campus, and telecom environments.

name: SONiC Lite by PLVision
description: SONiC Lite is PLVision's lightweight enterprise SONiC distribution optimised for access, edge, campus, and OOB management switches with 30-50% lower hardware requirements.
